title: Belugas Zelda Items
description: All the ancient weapons from the game The Legend of Zelda Breath of the Wild
body:
This Minecraft mod brings some of the Sheikah items and weapons from the game The Legend of Zelda Breath of the Wild into minecraft while also adding some new ones.

This mod currently inculdes the following:
Two swords, various materials used to craft said swords

If you have been looking for a Breath of the Wild mod that actualy includes some of the sheikah items then this is the mod you are looking for!
